title: Health agency publishes seasonal flu guidance
content: The national health agency released official guidance for seasonal flu prevention and vaccination priorities.

title: Secret machine can read thoughts from photos
content: A viral post claims a secret machine can read thoughts just by scanning social media photos.

title: New labor rules update remote work handbook
content: The company updated its remote work handbook with guidance for availability collaboration and equipment reimbursement.

title: Unknown fruit reverses aging in one hour
content: An entertainment website claims an unknown fruit reverses aging in one hour without any scientific evidence.
